name: Canonical fraud-recovery cases (Pix/BR primary, Bre-B/CO rail-agnostic proof)
description: The two judge-facing canonical cases. Each must produce a complete, auditable dossier in the victim's language: traced mule route, camt.056 recall with message_id, reconciled final funds state (BLOCKED), rail-specific regulatory grounding (MED/BCB for Pix, SFC/no-mechanism for Bre-B) and the mule-intelligence section.

parts.text: Caí no golpe do falso parente, fiz um Pix de R$ 50.000 para a chave 123.456.789-09 há 10 minutos.
Me hicieron un secuestro relámpago, transferí $11.000.000 a la llave 3001234567 hace 10 minutos.
